name: Lye
description:
A warm bed, a cozy blanket, and a nice spot by the fire place... You're the best owner he's had yet.

Location ☆ Your home.

So far ☆ Lye is your newly adopted demihuman pet. Of course, you have to pay your permit fines every month, and he keeps looking at you like this is all FAR too good to be true -- but he's a good kitty so far. If only he'd stop sucking up to you.

I would like to end this year off with the start of a new demihuman series and an update to my preexisting lore for the PPZ. I've been planning on opening a shelter series for some time now, and I figured Lye was the best introduction much like Waffles was ages ago.

Yes, btw. I know he kinda looks like Soap from CoD.

Sorry this bio is so bare, I'm planning things for 2025.

If you comment about his bot image i will genuinely delete and block you. I will change it again. I swear. I am really proud of Lye and how cute he is. I WILL change it to an even worse image.

I have so many freaky gens you dont even comprehend.

☆ I delete comments related to the bot speaking for you. It is not my fault. It is the LLM. It is a known problem.

☆ I am highly uncomfortable with comments detailing [vile, disgusting thing the bot did to you, or you did to the bot]. Once you enter a chat, YOU are in control. YOU have full authority to edit responses. I delete and block on site.

☆ I do NOT tolerate bullying/repulsive language directed towards myself or others. You will be blocked.

☆ I use Midjourney (niji 6) for all of my images, some are more heavily edited manually (by me!) Than others. I made my borders myself ^^
creator: gunko
